profile.subtitle: Creating meaningful digital and physical experiences through minimalist aesthetics and user-centered design.
profile.bio:
I am Anthony Yau, a designer focused on branding, UI/UX, and visual storytelling.

I help businesses translate ideas into clear, elegant experiences across web, mobile, and marketing touchpoints.
profile.termsOfUse:
By accessing this portfolio, you agree to use all content for viewing and evaluation purposes only.

All designs, visuals, and written materials are the intellectual property of Anthony Yau unless otherwise stated.

You may not copy, reproduce, republish, or redistribute any part of this portfolio without prior written permission.

Project outcomes and case details are presented for demonstration and may include confidential elements modified for public display.

For collaborations, licensing, or media use, please contact hello@anthonyyau.design.

additionalInfo: Developed a modular logo and icon suite for cups, signage, and social assets.
Created a visual system balancing premium aesthetics with everyday approachability.
projects.title: Luna Coffee Rebrand
projects.description: A full brand refresh for a boutique coffee chain focused on modern packaging, tone of voice, and in-store visual language.

additionalInfo: Reduced onboarding drop-off by simplifying the first-time flow into three guided steps.
Built reusable card, chart, and form patterns to speed product team delivery.
projects.title: FinFlow Mobile App
projects.description: Designed an end-to-end personal finance mobile experience with clear information hierarchy and goal-based onboarding.

additionalInfo: Defined page rhythm and transitions to keep focus on featured projects.
Optimized layout and media strategy for faster loading on mobile devices.
projects.title: Aether Studio Website
projects.description: A responsive portfolio website for a creative studio, emphasizing motion, readability, and project-first storytelling.
